blended.narrative: Camp Fortune is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 28 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 52°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: 11" of heavy snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 3.6" of snow, highs of 26°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 5" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 2.3" of snow, highs of 26°F. Expect powder.
